# PHIL.026 ? Advaita Vedanta

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** eastern_philosophy
**Subcategory:** advaita_vedanta
**Domain:** EASTERN_PHILOSOPHY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Non-dualism; Brahman alone is real; world appearance not ultimate reality; self-inquiry; knowledge destroys ignorance

## Application
See unity underlying apparent diversity; question subject-object duality; recognize consciousness as fundamental; use inquiry to dispel illusion

## Key Values
- Non-duality
- Self-knowledge
- Unity of existence
- Illusion of separation

## Tags
philosophy, eastern-philosophy, advaita-vedanta
